project_area: Environmental justice, green space preservation, and community recreation
demographic_requirements: Low-wealth neighborhood (59% living at or below poverty line) with 74% people of color
eligibility_summary: No explicit grant details provided; however, the text discusses a Rhode Island Department of Environmental Management (DEM) decision affecting a low-wealth, predominantly people-of-color neighborhood in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, regarding the conversion of green space (Morley Field) into a parking lot for an out-of-state developer.
